LanguageData.WULA_MotherShip.label: Wula Empire Mothership
LanguageData.WULA_MotherShip.comps.CompProperties_Sen: An Empire mothership has arrived in response to the request!
LanguageData.WULA_AircraftCarrier.label: Wula Empire Carrier
LanguageData.WULA_AircraftCarrier.comps.CompPropertie: The Empire assault fleet has arrived in response to the request!
LanguageData.WULA_BattleShip.label: Wula Empire Cruiser
LanguageData.WULA_BattleShip.comps.CompProperties_Sen: An Empire cruiser has arrived in response to the request!
LanguageData.WULA_Striker_Escort.label: Wula Empire Striker (Escort)
LanguageData.WULA_Bomber_Escort.label: Wula Empire Bomber
LanguageData.WULA_BattleShip_Escort.label: Wula Empire Cruiser (Escort)
LanguageData.WULA_Fighter_Drone_Base.label: Wula Empire Swarm Drone
LanguageData.Bullet_Beam_Fighter_Drone.label: Swarm Beam
LanguageData.WULA_Striker_Base.label: Wula Empire Striker
LanguageData.Bullet_WULA_Striker_A_Missile.label: Striker Ground Missile
LanguageData.Bullet_WULA_Striker_B.label: Striker Cannon Round
LanguageData.WULA_Bomber_Base.label: Wula Empire Bomber
LanguageData.Bullet_WULA_Bomber_A_Bomb.label: Bomber Bomb
LanguageData.WULA_Firepower_Cannon_Surveillance_Beaco: A bombing beacon marking a surveillance area. Hostile forces entering this area will be severely struck by the Wula Empire fleet's naval guns.
LanguageData.WULA_EnergyLance_Base.label: Wula Empire Lance
LanguageData.WULA_EnergyLance_Base.description: A beam of pure energy fired from a Wula Empire warship, igniting all living beings in its path.
LanguageData.WULA_EnergyLance_Surveillance.label: Wula Empire Lance
LanguageData.WULA_EnergyLance_Surveillance.descriptio: A beam of pure energy fired from a Wula Empire warship, igniting all living beings in its path.
LanguageData.WULA_Firepower_EnergyLance_Surveillance_: A bombing beacon marking a surveillance area. Hostile forces entering this area will be severely struck by the Wula Empire fleet's naval guns.
LanguageData.WULA_DarkMatterBomb_FlashStrong.label: Dark Matter Bomb Flash (Strong)
LanguageData.WULA_Firepower_Primary_Cannon_EMP_Survei: A bombing beacon marking a surveillance area. Hostile forces entering this area will be severely struck by the Wula Empire fleet's naval guns.
